creator: misha@freebsd.org
text:
see Message ID: Z4gOW_owvh_Su7vX@freefall.freebsd.org to clusteradm@freebsd.org

cluster sshd_config generation tools should support per-user configuration to allow developers restrict key types (e.g. hw only) for access to different servers/services (like git access allowed only for hw-backed keys and freefall/universe/ref can be accessed with usual ones)

it's done with the following config:

> Match User <developer_account>
>       PubkeyAcceptedAlgorithms sk-*
